// Code generated by github.com/romshark/datapages; DO NOT EDIT.

// Package href provides generators for datastar anchor hypertext references.
// Use these in templates instead of hardcoding URLs.
package href

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

// Catalog references /catalog/{category}/{$}
func Catalog(category string, query QueryCatalog) string {
	var (
		pStr string
	)

	if query.Page != 0 {
		pStr = strconv.FormatInt(query.Page, 10)
	}

	anyQuery := query.Page != 0 ||
		query.Sort != ""

	var b strings.Builder
	l := len("/catalog/") +
		len(category) +
		len("/")
	if anyQuery {
		l += len("?")
	}

	// n = number of query params already accounted for (for '&')
	n := 0

	if query.Page != 0 {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		n++
		l += len("p=") + len(pStr)
	}
	if query.Sort != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		n++
		l += len("sort=") + len(query.Sort)
	}
	_ = n

	b.Grow(l)

	b.WriteString("/catalog/")
	b.WriteString(category)
	b.WriteString("/")
	if anyQuery {
		b.WriteString("?")
	}

	n = 0

	if query.Page != 0 {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		n++
		b.WriteString("p=")
		b.WriteString(pStr)
	}
	if query.Sort != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		b.WriteString("sort=")
		b.WriteString(query.Sort)
	}

	return b.String()
}

// QueryCatalog is the query parameters for Catalog
type QueryCatalog struct {
	Page int64  `query:"p"`
	Sort string `query:"sort"`
}
